$comment: One append-only gate-decision record in Diagnostic_State.meta.json execution.gate_events[]. See docs/runner-governed-execution.md Increment 5. The fields here are the STRUCTURAL contract (required minimum + enums + types) checked per-item by run_gate.py --check-state via apodictic_artifacts.validate_obj. The cross-field / fold invariants the stdlib subset checker cannot express — attestation coverage against the event's own attested_contract, migration-prefix integrity, finding_deltas/disposition_deltas clearing-only, checks[]/finding_deltas/disposition_deltas inner shapes (each disposition_deltas value is a full apodictic.finding_disposition.v1 record incl. trigger-iff-deferred, keyed by its own id), the no-simultaneous-launder rule (one event may not carry both finding_deltas[F-X]='revised' and disposition_deltas[F-X]), pointer==fold — live in gate-state (run_gate.py --check-state).
title: APODICTIC gate event (apodictic.gate_event.v1)

gate.$comment: manifest phases key; gate-state asserts membership

disposition_deltas.$comment: {F-id: apodictic.finding_disposition.v1 record}, frozen at revision_round clear time from the run's disposition markers (docs/finding-dispositions.md); only on a clearing passed; folds into execution.finding_dispositions last-event-wins
